purpose: Registers the user's prior weapon/class test images as visual targets for grip, attachment, class silhouette, and generated sprite review.
rules: Reference images guide pose intent, hand grip, weapon axis, shield/book/staff placement, armor silhouette, and class fantasy only.
Do not derive runtime anchors from reference-image bounding boxes; runtime anchors still come from pose templates, motion frames, and attachment contracts.
Do not copy reference backgrounds, side-by-side layouts, text, or canvas framing into generated source sprites.
Generated source sprites must still follow the planned 1254x1254 transparent PNG, gender, tone, underwear, motion-frame, and no-text/no-watermark rules.
If generated art disagrees with anchors, anchors win; if repeated art fails the same grip, revisit the pose template before bulk generation.

referenceTargets.label: Warrior representative armor and sword-shield silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/1.Warrior Representative.png
attachmentFocus: Leather-and-metal warrior silhouette should preserve shoulder, chest, belt, knee, and boot attachment readability.
Round shield should feel held by the offhand/forearm, not floating beside the body.
Sword grip should sit inside the main hand with the crossguard near the knuckles.

referenceTargets.label: Assassin representative dual-dagger silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/2.Assassin Representative.png
attachmentFocus: Dual weapons should mirror hand grip contact without drifting outside the fists.
Light armor silhouette should keep scarf, shoulder, bracer, belt, and boot reads separate from the body.

referenceTargets.label: Assassin representative hair variant and dual-dagger silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/2.Assassin Representative1.png
attachmentFocus: Hair and hood/scarf should not hide weapon hand contact points.
Dual dagger direction should remain readable from both wrists.

referenceTargets.label: Fighter representative gauntlet guard silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/3.Fighter Representative.png
attachmentFocus: Gauntlets should wrap the fists and wrists, not sit as separate props.
Raised guard should keep both fist centers readable for hitbox and impact VFX anchors.

referenceTargets.label: Archer representative bow and quiver silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/4.Archer Representative.png
attachmentFocus: Bow grip must be held by the forward hand while the arrow line passes through draw hand, nock, and tip.
Quiver and leather gear should read as attached to the torso/back, not as loose background elements.

referenceTargets.label: Mage representative wand and book silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/5.Mage Representative — Wand + Book.png
attachmentFocus: Book should sit in the offhand with palm/fingers supporting it.
Wand/casting prop should align with the caster hand without losing wrist direction.

referenceTargets.label: Mage representative two-hand staff silhouette
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/2.직업/6.Mage Representative — Staff.png
attachmentFocus: Staff must stay on a clear base-to-top axis with the grip hand wrapped around the shaft.
Free casting hand should remain separate from the staff for VFX anchor readability.

Crossguard should touch the hand area and blade axis should extend from the wrist/forearm direction.

referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/1.무기/무기 TEST/T08 — 활 Test.png
attachmentFocus: Forward hand should lock to the bow grip.
Draw hand, arrow nock, arrow tip, and bow grip should stay on a readable release line.

referenceTargets.label: T09A two-hand staff test
referenceTargets.sourcePath: C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/새 폴더 (2)/1.무기/무기 TEST/T09A — 양손 지팡이 Test.png
attachmentFocus: Staff base, grip, and top should stay on one vertical/near-vertical axis.
Grip hand should clasp the shaft while the other hand remains available for casting.

requiredVisualOutcomes: main hand sword grip and crossguard contact are visibly locked
offhand round shield stays attached to hand/forearm
warrior armor silhouette remains compatible with shoulders, torso, waist, knees, and boots
upper and lower grip hands share the same heavy-weapon handle
weapon tip, back end, and mass center follow one coherent heavy weapon axis
large weapon does not float away from either hand
bow grip is locked to the forward hand
draw hand, nock, arrow tip, and bow string read as one release setup
archer silhouette remains readable without hiding the arrow axis
staff base, grip, and top align on a single staff axis
grip hand visibly holds the staff shaft
casting hand remains separate enough for spell VFX anchoring
gauntlets wrap both fists and wrists
fist centers remain readable for hitbox and impact VFX
guard stance keeps both hands attached to the body rather than prop-floating
